raw_consumer_statement:
I am filing this complaint against Citibank regarding an unauthorized charge on my account. A merchant enrolled me in autopay without my explicit consent and subsequently charged my card without my knowledge. This charge is fraudulent, as I did not authorize the autopay enrollment or the subsequent transaction. 

I have contacted Citibanks Executive Response Unit and requested a reversal of the charge, waiver of associated interest and fees, and written confirmation of the resolution. However, I have not yet received a satisfactory response. Attached are the email from the merchant notifying me of the autopay enrollment, my communication with Citibank, and proof of the unauthorized charge on my account statement.
